name: @amzn/dlt-cli
description: CLI tool for Distributed Load Testing on AWS

scripts.bundle: node generate-version.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/dlt-cli.mjs --banner:js="/* Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All Rights Reserved. SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 */import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);"
